files.name: 2025-11-21 - RM26-4 - ACP Large load comments FINAL.pdf
files.path: sources/comments/files/20251121-5506__American-Clean-Power-Association/2025-11-21 - RM26-4 - ACP Large load comments FINAL.pdf
files.text: sources/comments/files/20251121-5506__American-Clean-Power-Association/2025-11-21 - RM26-4 - ACP Large load comments FINAL.txt

summary: The clean-energy and storage trade group backs timely, reliable, cost-effective large-load interconnection paired with the supply-side resources to serve it, and urges record development (including jurisdictional determinations) before any rule.
key_points: Pair load-interconnection reform with non-discriminatory access for clean supply and storage.
Flexibility and grid-enhancing technologies to use existing capacity.
Build the record, including jurisdiction, before acting.

quotes.text: Ensuring the timely, reliable, and cost-effective interconnection of large loads – along with the supply-side resources that will provide power to them – is an issue of utmost importance.
